title: Update Banner Pattern
description: Updates old textures of banner patterns from version 1.21.2
body:
**Update Banner Pattern** - updates old banner pattern textures from version 1.14 to the latest. The textures of the banner patterns have been changed in snapshot 24w33a, now its pattern is visible on each pattern.

![Creeper banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0319b5de4868782d162d820b725fd6ace081a436.png) ![Flower banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/849d507cb4042502037cabda1a556b6529d47788.png) ![Globe banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221b2610c24afb637881a95bd8550f08696fe79b.png) ![Mojang banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976d3b76558e2e04bcd6a5f639ff4bc0e939d801.png) ![Piglin banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/597e68491e521fcf256546160e2cbf3b106f5439.png) ![Skull banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f556e53d8e8bb9bf1c057e649382e9f340fe77.png) ![Flow banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26214c19cbb9f6bba96841d8db96e487cb67294b.png) ![Guster banner pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6717f2fac6fabe619f81f08de0ecc6ef793f608.png)

A convenient resource pack, now the banner patterns will become more understandable for everyone, from the display of the drawing on the item.

Textures have been changed since version 1.14, but there are fewer patterns on the old versions than in the new versions!
